projectDescription: A browser-first operating system simulation with a full desktop environment, 70+ built-in apps, cloud accounts, a community package manager (UUR), and developer tooling.
keyFeatures: Browser-first OS desktop environment with window management, taskbar, and start menu
70+ built-in apps including Terminal, File Explorer, Browser, Settings, and Facility tools
Online accounts and cloud sync powered by Supabase (sign up, profiles, sync)
UUR (UrbanShade User Repository) — community-driven package manager with 50+ packages
DEF-DEV Console 3.0 — developer toolkit with console, terminal, actions, storage, and diagnostics
BIOS/UEFI interface, recovery mode, safe mode, and BugcheckScreen crash handling
Moderation system with NAVI Monitor, ban/warn/mute actions, and statistics
Full in-app documentation with multiple guides, changelog viewer, and search
publicApiSurface: UUR CLI: uur inst <pkg>, uur rm <pkg>, uur up, uur search <query>, uur info <pkg>
Terminal commands: help, ls, cd, cat, mkdir, rm, ps, kill, top, neofetch, ping, curl
DEF-DEV terminal: bugcheck <code>, crash [type], reboot, shutdown, ls, get/set/del, lockdown
System Bus events: crash, reboot, lockdown, boot (src/lib/systemBus.ts)
App Registry: appRegistry.tsx for registering new apps
Keyboard shortcuts: Shift+T (Terminal), Shift+Q (Close), Shift+L (Lock), Ctrl+Shift+D (DEF-DEV)
BIOS access: DEL during POST; Recovery Mode: F2; Safe Mode: F8
